data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Significant Increase
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 7.5 billion USDC and redeemed around 5.7 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to July 17. This activity resulted in a net increase of about 1.8 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 64.5 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $64.7 billion. Of these reserves, around $10.1 billion is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately $54.7 billion.

data.title: ZachXBT questions Pepe creator's NFT project's slow action, hackers have transferred funds to MEXC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain Detective ZachXBT published an article stating that the NFT project ChainSaw related to Pepe creator Matt Furie has been silent for more than a month since it was infiltrated by North Korean hackers. Although the stolen assets can be frozen, the team has not taken any countermeasures. At present, the North Korean hacker group ITW has transferred part of the funds to the MEXC exchange. It is reported that the incident caused a loss of more than 1 million US dollars.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase, Citi and Wells Fargo Lose $5,361,000,000 To Bad Loans in One Quarter As Customers Fail To Pay Debt
data.description:
JPMorgan Chase, Citi and Wells Fargo say they’ve lost $5. 361 billion from customers who can no longer pay their debt. In their Q2 2025 earnings reports, the three major banks disclosed billions of dollars in losses from “net charge-offs” — loans written off as uncollectible after all efforts to recover payments proved unsuccessful
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/19/jpmorgan-chase-citi-and-wells-fargo-lose-5361000000-to-bad-loans-in-one-quarter-as-customers-fail-to-pay-debt/

data.title: The whale closed its DOGE long position at a high level and increased its position again, making a floating profit of 1.64 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale closed its DOGE long position at a high level yesterday, locking in a profit of $2.14 million. 10 hours ago, the address increased its position again, going long on 84.08 million DOGE with 10x leverage, with a position amount of about $21.24 million, and currently has an unrealized floating profit of $1.64 million.

data.title: New wallet withdraws 6,137 ETH worth $21.4 million from Kraken
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the new wallet withdrew 6,137 ETH from the Kraken exchange, with a total value of approximately US$21.4 million at the current price.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Changing the Game—But Are They Drifting From Satoshi’s Vision?
data.description:
The emergence of Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) is reshaping the landscape of cryptocurrency investment and broadening access for a diverse range of investors; however, this shift raises critical questions about whether these financial products align with the original principles and ideals laid out by Satoshi Nakamoto, the elusive creator of Bitcoin. As we witness traditional financial structures integrating with decentralized digital currencies, it becomes essential to examine the implications for Bitcoin's foundational goals of decentralization, privacy, and financial autonomy. Are these financial innovations enhancing the ecosystem, or do they risk straying from the core vision that aimed to empower individuals and minimize reliance on centralized institutions?
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-etfs-are-changing-the-game-but-are-they-drifting-from-satoshis-vision/

data.title: Binance: Alpha users with at least 160 points can claim 900 ESPORTS airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Yooldo Games (ESPORTS) trading on Binance Alpha will start at 17:00 (UTC+8) on July 19, 2025. After the trading starts, users with at least 160 Alpha points can apply for 900 ESPORTS token airdrops. First come, first served, until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends. Applying for an airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.description:
